title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology presents a perspective that AI agents are transforming modern software design. The video argues that design systems and context engineering are essential for guiding intelligent agents to build consistent and correct applications using MCP.
writeup: This IBM Technology video examines how AI agents are changing modern software design, arguing that design systems and context engineering are needed to guide agents toward consistent, correct applications built with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It frames design systems and context management as the connective layer between intent and generated code. The central takeaway: pairing design systems with MCP gives agents the structured context required to produce reliable, standards-aligned output.
